visa_types.name: Visiting Family and Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden, kindly find attached checklist.
Visa Application form to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Visiting Family and Friends]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note: 
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, with service fee of 45 euro equivalent in USD
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in USD
- Fees are non-refundable.

[Table:   Visiting Family and Friends]
visa_types.processing_time: Processing time for a Schengen visa is up to 15 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa to visit relatives and friends
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa to visit relatives and friends

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Visiting Family and Friends]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note: 
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, with service fee of 45 euro equivalent in USD
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in USD
- Fees are non-refundable.

[Table:   Visiting Family and Friends]

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden, kindly find attached checklist.
Visa Application form to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
One [1] photograph of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
Processing time for a Schengen visa is up to 15 days.

## Download Forms

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4YIKmmGW9cqxk4DVTKs3RD/d3b0277161afc239c4f49b56a10aba8e/visa-application-form.pdf)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.processing_time: Processing time for a Schengen visa is up to 15 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Information on EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC, can be found on the Swedish Embassy webpage but also on the webpage of the
                                                                        Swedish migration agency. If you believe that you meet the requirements for this, a potential application would be handled according to the directive. If the requirements are not
                                                                        met, it would be handled according to the Schengen visa code. It is the Embassy that does the assessment whether the directive is applicable or not. 
Family members of EU/EEA citizens - Sweden Abroad (https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/tiYmC6010hrBXpPfm20A0?domain=swedenabroad.se/)
Residence cards for EEA citizens' family who are non-EEA citizens - Swedish Migration Agency (migrationsverket.se) (https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/3M5iC7AZAsAJL8ztNTTZP?domain=migrationsverket.se)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Information on EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC, can be found on the Swedish Embassy webpage but also on the webpage of the
                                                                        Swedish migration agency. If you believe that you meet the requirements for this, a potential application would be handled according to the directive. If the requirements are not
                                                                        met, it would be handled according to the Schengen visa code. It is the Embassy that does the assessment whether the directive is applicable or not. 
Family members of EU/EEA citizens - Sweden Abroad (https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/tiYmC6010hrBXpPfm20A0?domain=swedenabroad.se/)
Residence cards for EEA citizens' family who are non-EEA citizens - Swedish Migration Agency (migrationsverket.se) (https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/3M5iC7AZAsAJL8ztNTTZP?domain=migrationsverket.se)

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden, kindly find attached checklist.
Visa Application form to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. visa_types.processing_time: Processing time for a Schengen visa is up to 15 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month
                                                                        you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month
                                                                        you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Business]

## Documents Required

If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden, kindly find attached checklist.
Visa Application form to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

- color photo

- showing full face

- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
